latencyMs.description: Minimum round-trip time in ms, same definition as a full run. Omitted when offline/sample failed.

jitterMs.description: RTT variation in ms over the short sampling window. Omitted when offline/sample failed.

distanceKm.description: Client to server distance in km when known; null otherwise.

durationMs.description: Wall-clock duration of the latency sample in milliseconds.
